div.p: Please check the URL for errors or explore our site using the navigation menu. Here are some helpful links to get you started.

Build, test, and modernize autonomously.\",\"heading\":\"Keep shipping.\",\"subtitle\":\"Agentic coding that meets you where you work. Write, test, and deploy autonomously with full codebase context.\",\"heroCta\":\"Get started\",\"clientLogos\":\"In production\",\"why\":{\"title\":\"Why code with Mistral Vibe?\"},\"whyMistral\":[{\"label\":\"/Ship 10x faster\",\"content\":{\"title\":\"Ship 10x faster\",\"description\":\"Halve pull request time with agents that handle boilerplate, tests, and documentation. Your team focuses on architecture and business logic.\",\"imageUrl\":\"/img/vibe/ship_10x_faster.svg\"}},{\"label\":\"/Codebase-aware context\",\"content\":{\"title\":\"Codebase-aware context\",\"description\":\"Deep project understanding that informs every completion, refactor, and review — tuned for agentic workflows.\",\"imageUrl\":\"/img/vibe/codebase_aware.svg\"}},{\"label\":\"/Escape legacy debt\",\"content\":{\"title\":\"Escape legacy debt\",\"description\":\"Translate entire codebases to modern stacks while preserving functionality and domain knowledge.\",\"imageUrl\":\"/img/vibe/escape_legacy_debt.svg\"}},{\"label\":\"/Make the models yours\",\"content\":{\"title\":\"Make the models yours\",\"description\":\"Fine-tune on your code to understand proprietary languages, internal frameworks, and team conventions.\",\"imageUrl\":\"/img/vibe/make_the_model_yours.svg\"}}],\"figures\":{\"figure1\":{\"caption\":\"developer adoption across all client projects\"},\"figure2\":{\"caption\":\"code completion accuracy, doubling previous solutions\"},\"figure3\":{\"caption\":\"client projects show productivity gains in under six months\"}},\"getStarted\":{\"title\":\"Get started with Mistral Vibe\",\"description\":\"Purpose-built models power autonomous execution, intelligent completions, full project awareness, and across terminal, IDE, and async agents.\"},\"plans\":[{\"id\":\"pro\",\"title\":\"Pro\",\"description\":\"Higher limits and priority access for professionals building code.\",\"cta\":\"Upgrade to Pro\",\"color\":\"#1E1E1E\"},{\"id\":\"team\",\"title\":\"Team\",\"description\":\"Shared usage for small development teams.\",\"cta\":\"Upgrade to Team\",\"color\":\"#292929\"},{\"id\":\"api\",\"title\":\"API\",\"description\":\"Programmatic access to Mistral's coding models for custom integrations.\",\"cta\":\"Try our API\",\"color\":\"#363636\"},{\"id\":\"enterprise\",\"title\":\"Enterprise\",\"description\":\"Contact us for custom deployments, solutions, model training and dedicated support.\",\"cta\":\"Choose Enterprise\"}],\"oneStack\":\"One stack, every surface.\",\"oneStackDescription\":\"Mistral Vibe powers terminal-native agents, IDE extensions, and async workflows — all built on the same core models and fine-tuning techniques.\",\"howTeams\":\"How teams use Mistral Vibe today.\",\"arbo\":[{\"label\":\"/Terminal-native coding agent.\",\"content\":{\"title\":\"Terminal-native coding agent\",\"description\":\"Explores, edits, and runs commands across your repository using natural language.\",\"imageUrl\":\"/img/vibe/terminal_coding_agent.svg\"}},{\"label\":\"/Multi-file orchestration\",\"content\":{\"title\":\"Multi-file orchestration\",\"description\":\"Architecture-level reasoning across your entire codebase, not just individual files.\",\"imageUrl\":\"/img/vibe/multi_file_orchestration.svg\"}},{\"label\":\"/Smart references\",\"content\":{\"title\":\"Smart references\",\"description\":\"Reference files, execute shell commands, and configure settings with simple shortcuts.\",\"imageUrl\":\"/img/vibe/smart_references.svg\"}},{\"label\":\"/Agent skills\",\"content\":{\"title\":\"Agent skills\",\"description\":\"Extend with custom skills via open standards—add domain expertise and automate repeatable workflows.\",\"imageUrl\":\"/img/vibe/agent_skills.svg\"}},{\"label\":\"/Connects to your stack\",\"content\":{\"title\":\"Connects to your stack\",\"description\":\"Integrates with GitHub, GitLab, Jira, and proprietary codebases. Pull context from issues, PRs, and project boards directly into your workflow.\",\"imageUrl\":\"/img/vibe/connects_to_your_stack.svg\"}},{\"label\":\"/Tab to complete\",\"content\":{\"title\":\"Tab to complete\",\"description\":\"Get intelligent code suggestions in real-time as you type, with multi-line completions tailored to your codebase.\",\"imageUrl\":\"/img/vibe/tab_to_complete.svg\"}},{\"label\":\"/Async agents\",\"content\":{\"title\":\"Async agents\",\"description\":\"Extended autonomy and parallel execution beyond your active session.\",\"imageUrl\":\"/img/vibe/async_agents.svg\"}},{\"label\":\"/Native IDE extensions\",\"content\":{\"title\":\"Native IDE extensions\",\"description\":\"Intelligent completions, context-aware chat, and inline code editing for VS Code and JetBrains.\",\"imageUrl\":\"/img/vibe/native_ide_extensions.svg\"}}],\"faqTitle\":\"Frequently Asked Questions\",\"faqItems\":[{\"question\":\"How do I get started with Mistral Vibe?\",\"answer\":\"\u003cp\u003eInstall the CLI with a single command in your terminal \u0026mdash;\u0026nbsp;curl -LsSf https://mistral.ai/vibe/install.sh | bash\u0026nbsp;or\u0026nbsp;uv tool install mistral-vibe. Access Devstral via\u0026nbsp;\u003ca target=\\\"_blank\\\" href=\\\"https://mistral.ai/pricing\\\"\u003eFree, Pro, or Team plans\u003c/a\u003e, or\u0026nbsp;\u003ca target=\\\"_blank\\\" href=\\\"https://console.mistral.ai/codestral/cli\\\"\u003eget an API key\u003c/a\u003e\u0026nbsp;from Mistral Studio.\u003c/p\u003e\"},{\"question\":\"What can Mistral Vibe do?\",\"answer\":\"Mistral Vibe generates production-ready code from natural language, refactors across files, auto-generates tests, reviews pull requests, documents APIs, migrates legacy codebases — all with full project context.\"},{\"question\":\"What's the difference between Mistral's coding models?\",\"answer\":\"Devstral is our agentic model family for complex, multi-step software engineering. Codestral handles fast code completions. Codestral Embed powers semantic code search.\"},{\"question\":\"What's the difference between the CLI and the IDE extension?\",\"answer\":\"The CLI is a terminal-native coding agent for autonomous, multi-file tasks. The IDE extension provides inline completions and chat within VS Code and JetBrains, available on the Enterprise plan only.\"},{\"question\":\"Can I fine-tune Mistral's coding models?\",\"answer\":\"Yes. Fine-tune Devstral or Codestral on your codebase to learn proprietary languages, internal frameworks, and team conventions. Enterprises can partner with our applied team for custom model training on proprietary data.\"},{\"question\":\"Can I deploy Mistral Vibe on-premises or in a VPC?\",\"answer\":\"\u003cp\u003eYes, you can \u003ca target=\\\"_blank\\\" href=\\\"https://docs.mistral.ai/deployment/self-deployment\\\"\u003eself-host\u003c/a\u003e Mistral Vibe or deploy on Mistral Cloud, \u003ca target=\\\"_blank\\\" href=\\\"https://mistral.ai/products/mistral-compute\\\"\u003eMistral Compute\u003c/a\u003e, or \u003ca target=\\\"_blank\\\" href=\\\"https://docs.mistral.ai/deployment/cloud\\\"\u003emajor cloud providers\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/p\u003e\"}],\"useCases\":[{\"title\":\"Build\",\"iconType\":\"chevron\",\"iconBg\":\"bg-mistral-footer-band-5\",\"items\":[{\"title\":\"Code generation and editing\",\"description\":\"Production-ready code from natural language, intelligent refactoring across files and modules.\"},{\"title\":\"Testing\",\"description\":\"Auto-generated tests that evolve alongside the codebase.\"},{\"title\":\"Performance optimization\",\"description\":\"Identifies bottlenecks and suggests improvements for better speed and efficiency.\"}]},{\"title\":\"Maintain\",\"iconType\":\"puzzle\",\"iconBg\":\"bg-mistral-footer-band-4\",\"items\":[{\"title\":\"Code review\",\"description\":\"Context-aware feedback and early issue-catching.\"},{\"title\":\"Debugging and error detection\",\"description\":\"Identifies syntax errors, logical bugs, and typos.\"},{\"title\":\"Code documentation\",\"description\":\"Automatically maintained inline comments, API docs, and architectural overviews.\"}]},{\"title\":\"Modernize\",\"iconType\":\"arrow\",\"iconBg\":\"bg-mistral-footer-band-3\",\"items\":[{\"title\":\"Legacy migration\",\"description\":\"Whole-codebase translation without losing business logic.\"},{\"title\":\"Code modernization\",\"description\":\"Upgrade outdated patterns and frameworks while preserving functionality.\"},{\"title\":\"Dependency updates\",\"description\":\"Automated library upgrades with compatibility checking.\"}]}],\"trained\":\"Trained to build your software\"},\"PricingPage\":{\"h1\":\"Pricing\",\"base\":\"Base\",\"students\":\"Students\",\"student-terms\":\"Valid for a maximum of 12 months for verified students at accredited higher institutions For more information, please see our \",\"privacyPolicyTextLink\":\"Privacy Policy\",\"thank-you-title\":\"Thank you for your report.\",\"thank-you-description\":\"We appreciate you taking the time to help us maintain a safe and compliant platform. Our team will review the information you've provided and take appropriate action as necessary. If we need further information, we may reach out to you using the contact details you've supplied. Thank you for helping us keep Mistral AI a secure and respectful environment for all users.\"},\"BlockCustomerCarousel\":{\"btnLabel\":\"Read all\"},\"stickyTalkToLeChat\":{\"placeholder\":\"Talk to Le Chat\"},\"DynamicCTA\":{\"default\":\"Try Studio\",\"leChat\":\"Try Le Chat\",\"vibe\":\"Try Vibe\",\"documentAi\":\"Try Document AI\",\"careers\":\"Join Us\",\"voxtralTts\":\"Try Voxtral TTS\"}},\"now\":\"$undefined\",\"timeZone\":\"UTC\",\"children\":\"$L13\"}]\n"])
